title: Topcoder Identity Service: tests implementation
agent_summary: This architecture document outlines the approach to implement comprehensive testing for the Topcoder Identity Service revised in TypeScript and PostgreSQL. It covers e2e tests, unit tests, and Postman collections targeting real databases to ensure >=90% coverage on overall, branch, and line metrics while preserving existing functionalities such as Redis cache and Kafka event bus.

agent_rubric_self_check.overall_notes: The architecture doc comprehensively covers problem, approach, constraints, risks, edge cases, and acceptance criteria with clear actionable steps and artifact plans.

title: Learn AI – Build and Deploy an AI Agent with Topcoder MCP on Hugging Face
agent_summary: Design a comprehensive architecture for an AI Agent application that leverages the Topcoder Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and runs within a Hugging Face Space using CPU Basic tier. The architecture must support varied agent types (chatbot, automation, research assistant, code generator, visualization), ensure smooth MCP integration via SSE or Streamable HTTP, provide a user-friendly UI, and include deployment and documentation considerations.

agent_rubric_self_check.overall_notes: The architecture document fully addresses problem scope, design approach, file plan, interfaces, constraints, risks, edge cases, and acceptance criteria with clear, actionable details suitable for implementation and review.
